channel.title: GDP on TRISPECTIVE
channel.description: Recent content in GDP on TRISPECTIVE

item.description: 1].GVA : Feature Pre-2015 Methodology Post-2015 Methodology (Current) Headline Economic Indicator (What the media reports as “GDP”) GDP at Factor Cost (Focused purely on the producer’s raw costs) GDP at Market Prices (Reflects what consumers actually pay) Sectoral Growth Indicator (How we measure specific industries like Agriculture or Manufacturing) Measured using GDP at Factor Cost Measured using Gross Value Added (GVA) at Basic Prices The Baseline / Stepping Stone Factor Cost Basic Price Treatment of Taxes & Subsidies Lumped together as total “Indirect Taxes” and total “Subsidies.
